name: youtube_post_repeater_mvp
description: Sample n8n workflow for running the CLI, expanding posts, routing Telegram delivery by delivery_type, and sending follow-up chunks when captions are truncated. Set TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID and the YPR_* environment variables in the n8n container before enabling it.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Use this branch during setup so you can test the workflow on demand from the n8n editor.

nodes.name: Run CLI

parameters.command: sh -lc 'cd /workspace/youtube_post_repeater && raw_output=$(YPR_PRIMARY_BIN="${YPR_PRIMARY_BIN:-/usr/local/bin/post-archiver}" python3 app.py --source primary --channel "${YPR_CHANNEL:?Missing YPR_CHANNEL}" --limit "${YPR_FETCH_LIMIT:-3}" --json --state-file "${YPR_STATE_FILE:-./state.sqlite3}" --state-backend "${YPR_STATE_BACKEND:-sqlite}" --log-file "${YPR_LOG_FILE:-./logs/latest.jsonl}" 2>&1); status=$?; escaped_output=$(printf "%s" "$raw_output" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read()))"); printf "{\"status\":%s,\"stdout\":%s}\n" "$status" "$escaped_output"; exit 0'

nodes.notes: Runs inside a Dockerized n8n container that has python3 installed and this repo mounted at /workspace/youtube_post_repeater. Configure YPR_CHANNEL, YPR_FETCH_LIMIT, YPR_STATE_FILE, YPR_STATE_BACKEND, YPR_LOG_FILE, and optionally YPR_PRIMARY_BIN in the container environment. The node always exits successfully and passes the CLI exit status forward so the workflow can notify on real failures.

nodes.name: Parse CLI Result
nodes.notes: Parse the CLI result envelope. status=20 or payload.ok=false becomes an error-notification item; status=0 or 10 continues to post expansion.

nodes.name: Expand Posts
nodes.notes: Turn payload.posts[] into one item per post. When status=10 this emits no items, so the workflow stops quietly.

nodes.name: Send Error Notification
nodes.notes: Sends a Telegram alert when the CLI returns a real failure.

parameters.jsCode: return ($json.message_chunks || []).map((chunk, index) => ({ json: { text: chunk, post_id: $json.post_id, chunk_index: index, telegram_chat_id: $json.telegram_chat_id } }));

nodes.name: Send Message
nodes.notes: Send each chunk as its own Telegram message. Attach your Telegram credentials after importing.

nodes.name: Send Photo
nodes.notes: Use for delivery_type=photo. Attach your Telegram credentials after importing.

nodes.name: Send Media Group
nodes.notes: Use for delivery_type=media_group. Attach your Telegram credentials after importing.

nodes.name: Prepare Follow-up Chunks

parameters.jsCode: return ($json.followup_message_chunks || []).map((chunk, index) => ({ json: { text: chunk, post_id: $json.post_id, chunk_index: index, telegram_chat_id: $json.telegram_chat_id } }));

nodes.notes: Only emits items when caption was truncated.

nodes.name: Send Follow-up Message
nodes.notes: Send extra text chunks after photo/media_group when needed.
